page.title: Your model of you
page.subtitle: Everything we know — or have inferred — about you for the purpose of surfacing civic decisions that touch your life. Edit any field, clear any field, or turn the whole sensitive layer off.
page.ownYouCallout: You own this. Nothing about you lives somewhere we cannot show you.

noFieldsMode.title: Sensitive fields
noFieldsMode.description: When on, we store and read no sensitive fields (income, health, citizenship, justice involvement, cultural identity, veteran status). The rest of the platform still works — relevance just loses some signal richness.
noFieldsMode.toggleLabel: Never store sensitive fields about me
noFieldsMode.lockedDescription: Sensitive fields are paused. Toggle off to see and edit them again — your previously stored values are preserved.
noFieldsMode.cacheDisclosure: When the toggle is off, the values are decrypted server-side and held in your browser's local cache so the page renders without round-tripping the server. Clear your browser data or turn this back on to remove them locally.

education.title: Education
education.summary: Student status, parent of student, educator.

relational.title: People in your life
relational.summary: Aging parents and other relational geography.

field.clearConfirmBody: This removes the value from your profile. You can set it again any time.
field.lockedByNoFields: Paused while sensitive fields are off.

behavioral.title: Behavioral signals
behavioral.body: We'll show you what you've clicked, saved, dismissed, and dwelled on here once behavioral recording ships. Until then, this section is intentionally empty — we don't record anything we haven't shown you.

weights.title: Relevance weights
weights.body: Once the personalized ranker is live, this is where you'll see the per-axis scores that produced each recommendation, and which of your signals weighed how heavily.

events.title: Event log
events.body: Append-only record of actions we tracked — petitions signed, meetings attended, representatives contacted. Empty until we start recording these events.

housingTenure.label: Housing tenure
housingTenure.description: Whether you rent or own your primary residence. Surfaces housing-side legislation that targets renters vs. owners differently.

buildingType.label: Building type
buildingType.description: What kind of structure you live in.

taxExposure.label: Tax exposure
taxExposure.description: Which property-related taxes touch your household.

housingFlags.label: Housing situation
housingFlags.description: Special housing categories that change which bills affect you.

childrenAgeBands.label: Children's ages
childrenAgeBands.description: Coarse age bands of any children in your household. Drives school, childcare, and child-welfare relevance.

hasEldercareDependents.label: Eldercare dependents
hasEldercareDependents.description: Whether you care for an aging family member.

multigenerational.label: Multigenerational household
multigenerational.description: Multiple generations living under one roof.

hasPets.label: Pets at home
hasPets.description: Triggers relevance for animal-welfare, leash-law, and noise-ordinance bills.

partnerStatus.label: Partner status
partnerStatus.description: Affects tax, benefits, and family-law relevance.

employerSizeBand.label: Employer size
employerSizeBand.description: Roughly how big your employer is.

unionMember.label: Union member
unionMember.description: Drives relevance for labor and collective-bargaining bills.

gigWorker.label: Gig worker
gigWorker.description: Independent contractor or platform worker (Uber, DoorDash, etc.).

tippedWorker.label: Tipped worker
tippedWorker.description: Earnings depend significantly on tips — drives relevance for tipped-minimum-wage bills.

primaryTransitMode.label: Primary way you get around
primaryTransitMode.description: How you mostly commute or run errands.

vehicleTypes.label: Vehicles
vehicleTypes.description: What you drive — drives relevance for EV incentives, emissions rules, and vehicle regulation.

commuteBand.label: Commute distance
commuteBand.description: Roughly how far your commute is.

specialLicenses.label: Special licenses
specialLicenses.description: Niche regulated licenses that unlock specific bill categories.

transitPassHolder.label: Transit pass holder
transitPassHolder.description: Drives relevance for transit funding and fare-policy bills.

parentOfStudent.label: Parent of student
parentOfStudent.description: If you have school-age kids, which types of schools they attend.

educator.label: Educator or school staff
educator.description: Teacher, administrator, or support staff at any level.

interestTags.label: Topics you follow
interestTags.description: The issues you want us to surface bills about. Capped at 3 during onboarding for focus; broaden here if you want.

politicalSelfId.label: Political self-identification
politicalSelfId.description: Free-form, no required scale. Leave blank to decline.

trustedOrganizations.label: Trusted organizations
trustedOrganizations.description: Civic, advocacy, or community orgs whose positions you weigh heavily. We use these as transitive trust signals — "X opposes this bill" carries more weight when X is on your list.

faithCommunity.label: Faith community
faithCommunity.description: Which congregation or faith community (free-form). Drives relevance for religious-liberty and faith-based-services bills.

weeklyAttentionMinutes.label: Minutes per week
weeklyAttentionMinutes.description: How much time you want to spend on civic briefings each week. Drives how much we surface.

preferredDepth.label: Preferred depth
preferredDepth.description: How deeply you want briefings written.

accessibilityNeeds.label: Accessibility needs
accessibilityNeeds.description: How we should format briefings for you.

agingParentsState.label: Aging parents' state
agingParentsState.description: Their home state, if you help manage their care. Drives relevance for bills in another jurisdiction that affect your life.

incomeBand.label: Income band
incomeBand.description: Self-reported, optional. Used only for benefits-cliff bills — we never display this.

publicBenefits.label: Public benefits
publicBenefits.description: Which public benefits you currently receive. Used to surface benefits-affecting bills.

chronicConditionCategories.label: Chronic condition categories
chronicConditionCategories.description: Very coarse categories only — never specific diagnoses. Drives relevance for healthcare policy.

reproductiveHealthRelevance.label: Reproductive-health relevance
reproductiveHealthRelevance.description: Opt in if you want us to surface reproductive-health bills.

citizenshipStatus.label: Citizenship status
citizenshipStatus.description: Strictly opt-in. We use this only to warn you when bills target your community.

veteranStatus.label: Veteran or active duty
veteranStatus.description: Drives relevance for veterans' benefits, housing protections, and healthcare bills.

justiceInvolvement.label: Justice involvement
justiceInvolvement.description: Drives relevance for criminal-justice reform bills.

raceEthnicity.label: Race / ethnicity
raceEthnicity.description: Opt-in. Helps us warn you when bills are written about your community.

primaryLanguages.label: Primary languages
primaryLanguages.description: Languages you speak at home. Drives relevance for language-access and bilingual-services bills.

religiousCommunity.label: Religious community
religiousCommunity.description: Free-form. Drives relevance for religious-liberty and faith-based-services bills.

lgbtqIdentity.label: LGBTQ+ identity
lgbtqIdentity.description: Free-form. Drives relevance for LGBTQ-related bills.

tribalAffiliation.label: Tribal affiliation
tribalAffiliation.description: Tribal enrollment or sovereign nation affiliation, if any. Drives relevance for tribal-sovereignty bills.
